mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.username as username, u.real_name as realName, e.role_in_course as roleInCourse, e.enrolled_at as enrolledAt FROM course_enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.user_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY e.role_in_course DESC, u.user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_enrollments (course_id, user_id, role_in_course) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{userId}, #{roleInCourse})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_enrollments WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND user_id = #{userId}
